Programmes

Where the work
meets the world.

Active and upcoming initiatives across TRI AI's three divisions — Teaching, Research, and Innovation.

01 — Active

Currently running.

teaching Lagos, Nigeria

TRI AI Saturdays Lagos

A community-led AI study group running cohorts of learners through structured curricula, peer learning, and mentorship.

Read more →
research Pan-African

Sauti Project

Building speech and language resources for under-resourced African languages.

Read more →
research Pan-African

ChowNet

Computer-vision datasets and models for African food.
